metadata.title: Mai Samar da Favicon Kyauta – Ƙirƙiri favicon.ico Daga
metadata.description: Ƙirƙiri favicon.ico da cikakken saitin favicon don gidan yanar gizon ka daga hoto guda ɗaya. Dukan girma da ake buƙata a cikin danna guda ɗaya.

hero.title: Mai Samar da Favicon – Ƙirƙiri favicon.ico Kyauta
hero.description: Samar da favicon.ico da cikakken saitin alamomin PNG don gidan yanar gizon ka daga hoto guda ɗaya. Ana yin dukan sarrafa a cikin browser na gida.

software.name: Mai samar da favicon ta yanar gizo - mai ƙirƙirar alama kyauta don gidajen yanar gizo
alternateName: Mai samar da alamomin Favicon.ico da PNG
software.description: Mai samar da favicon kyauta ta yanar gizo. Ƙirƙiri favicon.ico da alamomin PNG 16x16, 32x32, 180x180, 192x192, da 512x512 ba tare da iyaka ba kuma ba tare da aika fayiloli zuwa sabar ba. Ana yin sarrafa a cikin browser na gida.
featureList: Samar da favicon.ico (16x16, 32x32, 48x48 a cikin fayil guda ɗaya)
Tallafawa hotunan tushe na PNG, JPG, da SVG
Samar da fayil na manifest.json don PWA
Sauke dukan fayiloli a matsayin ZIP
Sarrafa a cikin browser (ba a aika fayiloli zuwa sabar ba)
Kayan aiki kyauta, ba a buƙatar shiga ba

howTo.name: Yadda ake ƙirƙirar favicon don gidan yanar gizo
howTo.description: Yadda ake samar da favicon.ico da alamomin PNG (16x16, 32x32, 180x180, 512x512) daga hoto guda ɗaya. Wane girma ake buƙata da yadda ake ƙara favicon zuwa WordPress, HTML, da Next.js.

steps.name: Ƙara hoton tushe
steps.text: Ja fayil zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi hoto daga na'urar ka. Saukin alama ko hoto a tsarin PNG, JPG, ko SVG ya fi dacewa.

steps.name: Zaɓi girman alama
steps.text: Zaɓi wane girman alama kake buƙata: favicon.ico (32x32), alamomin PNG (16x16, 32x32, 180x180, 192x192, 512x512).

steps.name: Tsara zaɓuɓɓuka
steps.text: Saita launin baya (ko kiyaye gaskiya), yanke shawarar ko za a samar da fayil na manifest, da kuma ko za a sauke fayiloli ta atomatik.

steps.name: Samar kuma sauke fayiloli
steps.text: Bayan samarwa, ana iya sauke fayiloli a matsayin tarin ZIP ko kowane alama ɗaya-ɗaya.

contentBlocks.title: Menene favicon kuma me ya sa ya kamata ka samu ɗaya?
contentBlocks.html:
Favicon ƙaramin alama ne da ke bayyana a kan shafin browser kusa da taken shafin. Kuma kana ganin sa a cikin alamomin shafi, tarihin bincike, da kuma a kan allon gida na waya lokacin da wani ya ƙara shafin a matsayin gajeren hanya.

Wannan ƙaramin hoto yana da muhimmin aiki - yana taimaka wa masu amfani su gane shafin da sauri a cikin shafuka da yawa da ke buɗe. Lokacin da wani yana da shafuka goma sha biyu a buɗe a cikin browser, favicon galibi shi ne abu guda ɗaya da ake iya gani wanda ke bayyana shafin.

Mai samar da yana ƙirƙirar cikakken saitin alama: fayil na favicon.ico na gargajiya don browsers, alamomin PNG a girma daban-daban, da apple-touch-icon don na'urorin Apple. Idan kana gina aikace-aikacen yanar gizo (PWA), kuma za ka iya samar da alamomin 192x192 da 512x512 tare da fayil na manifest.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake ƙirƙirar favicon a matakai 3
contentBlocks.description: Samar da favicon yana ɗaukar 'yan daƙiƙu kaɗan kawai:

items.title: 1. Ƙara hoto
items.description: Ja fayil zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi hoto daga na'urar ka. Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa: PNG, JPG, SVG. Girman da ake ba da shawara: min. 512×512 pixels.

items.title: 2. Zaɓi girma
items.description: Zaɓi girman alama da kake buƙata. Don gidan yanar gizo na yau da kullum: favicon.ico, 32×32, da 180×180. Don PWA, ƙara 192×192 da 512×512.

items.title: 3. Sauke fayiloli
items.description: Bayan samarwa, sauke dukan fayiloli a matsayin ZIP ko kowane alama ɗaya-ɗaya. Ƙasan kayan aikin za ka sami umarnin yadda ake ƙara favicon zuwa shafin ka.

contentBlocks.title: Wane girman alama ne kayan aikin ke samarwa?
contentBlocks.html:
Kowane girma yana da amfaninsa:

favicon.ico (32×32)

Tsarin gargajiya da dukan browsers ke ganewa. Yana nuna a kan shafin browser.

16×16 da 32×32 PNG

Girman al'ada don browsers na zamani. Suna nuna a kan shafuka da cikin alamomin shafi.

180×180 PNG (apple-touch-icon)

Alama don na'urorin Apple (iPhone, iPad). Tana nuna lokacin da wani ya ƙara shafin zuwa allon gida.

192×192 da 512×512 PNG

Alamomin aikace-aikacen yanar gizo (PWA). Ana buƙata ta manifest kuma ana amfani da su a shagunan aikace-aikace.

Idan ba kana gina PWA ba, kana buƙatar kawai: favicon.ico, 32×32 PNG, da 180×180 PNG. Waɗannan fayiloli uku sun rufe yawancin buƙatu.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ke sa mai samar da favicon ya bambanta?

items.title: Sirri - fayiloli ba sa barin kwamfutar ka
items.description: Ana yin dukan ayyuka a cikin browser na gida. Ba a aika hoton zuwa kowane sabar ba. Bayan rufe shafin, ana share dukan bayanai.

items.title: Cikakken saitin a wuri ɗaya
items.description: Favicon.ico, alamomin PNG, apple-touch-icon, alamomin PWA, da manifest - duka daga hoto ɗaya, a cikin kayan aiki ɗaya.

items.title: Tallafawa PNG, JPG, da SVG
items.description: Za ka iya amfani da alama a kowane tsari. Idan kana da SVG - alamomin za su kasance masu kaifi a dukan girma.

items.title: Shirye don gidan yanar gizo da amfani da PWA
items.description: Kayan aikin yana samar da fayil na manifest.json don aikace-aikacen yanar gizo. A ƙasa za ka sami umarnin haɗa alamomin.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake amfani da mai samar da favicon
contentBlocks.description: Samar da favicon matakai masu sauƙi ne kaɗan:

items.title: 1. Ƙara hoton tushe
items.description: Ja fayil zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi hoto daga na'urar ka. Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa: PNG, JPG, SVG. Saukin alama ko hoto aƙalla 512×512 pixels ya fi dacewa.

items.title: 2. Zaɓi girman alama
items.description: Zaɓi wane girman alama kake buƙata. Za ka iya zaɓar duka ko wasu kawai. Don gidan yanar gizo na yau da kullum: favicon.ico, 32×32, da 180×180.

items.title: 3. Tsara zaɓuɓɓukan samarwa
items.description: Saita ƙarin zaɓuɓɓuka: baya (gaskiya ko launin da aka zaɓa), manifest (fayil na tsarin PWA), da sauke ta atomatik.

items.title: 4. Samar kuma sauke fayiloli
items.description: Bayan fara samarwa, kayan aikin yana sarrafa hoton a cikin gida - ba a aika komai zuwa sabar ba. Sauke dukan fayiloli a matsayin tarin ZIP ko alamomin ɗaya-ɗaya dabam.

contentBlocks.title: Zaɓuɓɓukan samarwa - menene kowannensu ke yi?
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
Girman PNG

16×1632×32180×180
Bayan gaskiya (PNG/ICO)
contentBlocks.html:
Baya (gaskiya ko launi)

Ta asali, mai samar da yana kiyaye gaskiya. Kuma za ka iya zaɓar takamaiman launin baya.

Samar da manifest (site.webmanifest)

Fayil na JSON don aikace-aikacen yanar gizo (PWA). Idan ba kana gina PWA ba, ba a buƙatar wannan zaɓi.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake sauke fayilolin da aka samar
contentBlocks.description: Bayan samar da alamomin, kana da zaɓuɓɓukan sauke da yawa:

items.title: Sauke duka a matsayin ZIP
items.description: Maɓallin "Sauke duka" yana ɗauke da dukan fayilolin da aka samar a cikin tarin ZIP guda ɗaya. Wannan shine zaɓin da ya fi dacewa lokacin da kake buƙatar cikakken saitin alama.

items.title: Sauke fayiloli ɗaya-ɗaya
items.description: Kowane alama da aka samar yana da maɓallin sauke nasa - za ka iya sauke fayil guda ɗaya ba tare da sauke dukan saitin ba. Yana da amfani lokacin da girma guda ɗaya ke buƙatar sabuntawa.

contentBlocks.title: Ina da yadda ake ƙara favicon

tabs.title: WordPress
tabs.html:
Yawancin jigogin WordPress suna da zaɓin da aka gina a ciki don saita alamar shafin. Za ka same shi a cikin bangaren gudanarwa:

Bayyanar → Gyara → Asalin Shafin → Alamar Shafin

Ɗora fayil na 512×512 a can - WordPress zai samar da ƙananan girma ta atomatik. Don cikakken iko akan alamomin, kuma za ka iya ɗora fayiloli kai tsaye zuwa babban directory ta hanyar FTP.

tabs.title: HTML
tabs.html:
Sanya fayilolin da aka samar a cikin babban directory na shafin ka (inda index.html yake). Sannan ƙara abubuwan da suka dace a cikin sashen <head>:

<link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" sizes="32x32">
<link rel="icon" href="/icon-32x32.png" type="image/png" sizes="32x32">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png">

Lambar da ke sama misali ne — daidaita hanyoyin don dacewa da tsarin shafin ka.

tabs.title: Next.js / React
tabs.html:
A cikin Next.js (App Router), sanya fayilolin favicon a cikin directory na app/ ko public/:

  • app/favicon.ico - Next.js yana ganewa ta atomatik
  • app/apple-icon.png - alamar Apple
  • public/ - sauran alamomin (192×192, 512×512)

Kuma za ka iya tsara alamomin a cikin layout.tsx ta hanyar abu na metadata.icons.

contentBlocks.title: Wane hoton tushe ne ya fi dacewa?
contentBlocks.description: Favicon ƙaramin hoto ne sosai - ƙanƙanta kamar 16×16 pixels. Ba kowane hoto ne ke aiki da kyau a matsayin tushe ba:

items.title: Siffofi masu sauƙi da alamomi masu karatu
items.description: Sauƙaƙƙun alamomi, haruffa guda ɗaya, ko alamomi sun fi dacewa. Guje wa hotuna masu rikitarwa da ke da cikakkun bayanan da yawa.

items.title: Tsarin murabba'i
items.description: Favicon murabba'i ne. Idan hoton tushe yana da rabo ban da 1:1, za a yanke shi ko a miƙa shi.

items.title: Girma mai isasshe
items.description: Muna ba da shawarar hoton tushe na aƙalla 512×512 pixels. Za a ƙara girman hotunan da suka fi ƙanƙanta.

items.title: Tsarin SVG a matsayin tushe mafi kyau
items.description: SVG yana ƙara girma ba tare da asarar inganci ba, don haka alamomin a dukan girma za su kasance masu kaifi.

items.title: Launuka masu bambanci mai girma
items.description: Favicon dole ne ya bayyana a kan bayan daban-daban (shafuka masu haske, yanayin duhu). Zaɓi launuka da ke kiyaye iya karatu.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai samar da favicon

items.question: Wane girma ne ya kamata hoton tushe ya kasance don samar da favicon?
items.answer: Girman da ake ba da shawara shine aƙalla 512×512 pixels a tsarin murabba'i (1:1). Tare da irin wannan tushe, alamomin a dukan girma za su kasance masu kaifi kuma masu karatu. Idan kana da alama a tsarin SVG - yi amfani da ita, saboda hotunan vector suna ƙara girma ba tare da asarar inganci ba.
items.answerSchemaText: Aƙalla 512×512 px, murabba'i (1:1). SVG ya fi dacewa saboda yana ƙara girma ba tare da asarar inganci ba.

items.question: Zan iya samar da favicon.ico kawai ba tare da sauran alamomin ba?
items.answer: Eh. Kafin samarwa, za ka iya zaɓar daidai wane girma kake buƙata - misali, favicon.ico kawai ko girman PNG da aka zaɓa kawai.
items.answerSchemaText: Eh, za ka iya zaɓar girma ɗaya-ɗaya kafin samarwa.

items.question: Wane tsarin hotuna ne mai samar da favicon ke tallafawa?
items.answer: Mai samar da yana karɓar hotuna a tsarin PNG, JPG, da SVG. A matsayin fitarwa, yana samar da fayil na favicon.ico da alamomin PNG a girman da aka zaɓa, shirye don ɗorawa zuwa gidan yanar gizon ka.
items.answerSchemaText: Shigarwa: PNG, JPG, SVG. Fitarwa: favicon.ico da alamomin PNG.

items.question: Shin favicon yana shafar matsayin bincike na Google?
items.answer: Ba kai tsaye ba - favicon ba abin tantancewa ne na matsayi ba. Duk da haka, a kaikaice yana shafar ganin alama: shafin da ke da alama ta ƙwararru ya fi sauƙin ganewa a cikin shafuka da yawa da ke buɗe, wanda zai iya haifar da ƙarin yawan danna a cikin sakamakon bincike.
items.answerSchemaText: Ba kai tsaye ba. A kaikaice yana inganta ganin alama da yawan danna.

items.question: Wane girman alama ne ya zama dole don gidan yanar gizo na yau da kullum?
items.answer: Don gidan yanar gizo na al'ada, fayiloli uku sun isa: favicon.ico (32×32), alamar PNG na 32×32, da apple-touch-icon 180×180. Idan shafin ya kamata ya yi aiki a matsayin aikace-aikacen yanar gizo (PWA), kuma kana buƙatar alamomin 192×192 da 512×512 tare da fayil na manifest.
items.answerSchemaText: favicon.ico, 32×32 PNG, da apple-touch-icon 180×180. Don PWA ƙara 192×192 da 512×512.

items.question: Menene fayil na site.webmanifest kuma yaushe ake buƙatar shi?
items.answer: Fayil ne na tsari don aikace-aikacen yanar gizo (PWA) da ke ɗauke da bayanai game da alama, suna, da launukan aikace-aikacen. Ana buƙatar shi lokacin da shafin ya kamata ya yi aiki a matsayin aikace-aikacen da aka ƙara zuwa allon gida na waya. Don gidajen yanar gizo na yau da kullum, ba a buƙatar sa.
items.answerSchemaText: Fayil na tsarin PWA. Ana buƙatar shi don aikace-aikacen allon gida, ba a buƙatar shi don gidajen yanar gizo na yau da kullum ba.

items.question: Shin favicon yana nuna iri ɗaya a dukan browsers?
items.answer: Yawancin browsers na zamani (Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari) suna gane fayil na favicon.ico da alamomin PNG. Bambance-bambance na iya faruwa a girman alama da ake nuna - Chrome ya fi son PNG 32×32, yayin da Safari a kan iOS ke amfani da apple-touch-icon 180×180. Don mafi kyawun dacewa, muna ba da shawarar samar da cikakken saitin girma.
items.answerSchemaText: Galibi eh. Samar da cikakken saitin girma don mafi kyawun dacewa.

items.question: Me ya sa favicon ba ya canzawa bayan ɗora sabon fayil?
items.answer: Browsers suna adana favicon a cikin cache sosai. Bayan ɗora sabon alama, gwada share cache na browser ko ƙara sigar parameter zuwa hanyar fayil (misali, /favicon.ico?v=2). Canjin na iya ɗaukar sa'o'i da yawa kafin ya bayyana.
items.answerSchemaText: Browsers suna adana favicon a cikin cache sosai. Share cache ko ƙara sigar parameter.
